characters.appearance: A light-skinned human hand and lower forearm. The hand has short, unpainted fingernails and slender fingers. No distinguishing marks are visible.
characters.wardrobe: No clothing is visible on the forearm.
characters.demeanor: Deliberate and precise in its tapping actions.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: Supernova के साथ रोज़ 10 मिनट reading practice करो। [Do 10 minutes of daily reading practice with Supernova.]
Unknown speaker says: 'All animals are equal...'
Unknown speaker says: 'Equal' मतलब, समान। ['Equal' means, equal.]
Unknown speaker says: 'But some animals are more important...'
Unknown speaker says: 'Important' यानी, ज़रूरी। ['Important' meaning, necessary.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the daily reading habit feature in a warm, encouraging tone.
- Demonstrates the instant Hindi translation pop-up for difficult English words.
- Sets a practical foundation for vocabulary building.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ 10 मिनट English पढ़ो (Read English for 10 minutes daily)
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others," one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.
equal
[ˈiːkwəl]
समान (equal)
सीख लिया (Mastered)
सीखें (Learn)
important
[ɪmˈpɔːrtnt]
ज़रूरी (important)

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: 'Read slowly...'
Unknown speaker says: 'Slowly' - धीरे। ['Slowly' - slowly.]
Unknown speaker says: 'The animals stood silent in the cold...'
Unknown speaker says: 'Cold' - ठंडा। ['Cold' - cold.]
Unknown speaker says: ऐसे ही नए words सीखो। [Learn new words like this.]
Unknown speaker says: 'Tried' - कोशिश की। ['Tried' - tried.]
Unknown speaker says: जब vocabulary अच्छी होगी, तो English बोलने का confidence अपने आप आएगा। [When your vocabulary is good, the confidence to speak English will come automatically.]
Unknown speaker says: Supernova के साथ आज ही शुरू करो! [Start today with Supernova!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Continues the demonstration of the reading and translation feature.
- Connects reading comprehension directly to speaking confidence, aligning with Supernova's core value proposition.
- Ends with a clear, motivating call to action to use the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ 10 मिनट English पढ़ो (Read English for 10 minutes daily)
Animal Farm
George Orwell
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others," one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.
slowly
[ˈsloʊli]
धीरे (slowly)
सीख लिया (Mastered)
सीखें (Learn)
cold
[koʊld]
ठंडा (cold)
tried
[traɪd]
कोशिश की (try)
words
[wɜːrdz]
शब्द (word)
something
[ˈsʌmθɪŋ]
कुछ (something)
farm
[fɑːrm]
खेत (farm)
always
[ˈɔːlweɪz]
हमेशा (always)
